body.title: Add encapsulation question to Systems Architect expert lens
body.result: added encapsulation key question to Systems Architect + Process/Meta Engineer in both TheIgors/EXPERTS.md (2116b8d3) and ADC/EXPERTS.md (4b6bcf2)
body.description:
The Systems Architect expert in EXPERTS.md asks about coupling, cohesion, and contract boundaries but does not explicitly ask the encapsulation question: 'Are there subsystems reaching across interfaces they shouldn't? What could be extracted into a service?' Add this as a key question to the Systems Architect entry in both ~/TheIgors/EXPERTS.md and ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/EXPERTS.md. Also add to the Process/Meta Engineer entry: 'Is the development process itself encapsulated — are design decisions being made at the right layer, or are implementation details leaking into the design conversation?'

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/EXPERTS.md (Systems Architect + Process/Meta sections), ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/EXPERTS.md (same)
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** two expert entries in two files; no changes to audit-expert skill logic
**Test plan:** no automated tests — doc edit; spot-check that each entry has Lens + Key questions fields after edit
**Validation:** both EXPERTS.md files contain 'encapsulat' in Systems Architect section
**Cleanup:** n/a
**Observable via:** grep 'encapsulat' ~/TheIgors/EXPERTS.md returns a match in Systems Architect section
